title: Smokeless Coal Fire for Stoves, Open Fires and Campfires 10kg or 20kg Bag (20Kg)
features: Premium multi-purpose smokeless fuel for open fires, cookers, room heaters and multi-fuel stoves.
Medium sized pillow shaped ovoid in Durable 'extra strong' packaging
High radiant heat output, clean burning, easy to light and control, low ash
Authorised for use in controlled areas - smokeless zones
description: Delivery to Mainland UK by Interlink Express. For other locations please call us on 0208 241 5700
